title: Audit Log / Compliance Trail
summary: Defines the immutable, append-only audit log that captures every order decision and risk event. For a platform serving friends and family with real money, this is the primary evidence of what the system decided vs what IBKR executed.
format: Newline-delimited JSON (JSONL). One JSON object per line. File opened in append mode ('a') only. Never overwritten, truncated, or deleted.

planned_events_session_3.description: Order blocked by risk manager before submission

implementation.called_from: log_order() — fires once per order status change
implementation.immutability_guarantee: open(AUDIT_LOG_FILE, 'a') — OS-level append mode; no seek, no truncate
implementation.timestamp_format: ISO 8601 UTC with Z suffix — datetime.utcnow().isoformat() + 'Z'

relationship_to_other_logs.data/orders.json: Mutable JSON array — updated in place when order status changes. Use for dashboard and analysis.
relationship_to_other_logs.data/trades.json: Mutable JSON array — closed trade records. Use for PnL analysis and gate counting.
relationship_to_other_logs.data/audit_log.jsonl: Immutable append-only. Use for compliance, dispute resolution, and order reconstruction.

compliance_note: For friends-and-family accounts using real capital, audit_log.jsonl is the primary evidence that: (a) the system intended to submit an order before it was executed, and (b) risk decisions were made in a documented, reproducible way. It is not sufficient to rely on IBKR's own records because those do not capture risk blocks, kill events, or system decisions that did not reach the broker.
retention_policy: Retained indefinitely. Not deleted on user offboarding. Archived to data/export/ on offboarding but original remains.
